title: what I EAT in a busy week in NYC | high protein & balanced recipes
description:
as the last weeks of summer are here, and as someone who loves summer produce I wanted to film a what I eat in a week video with as many summer recipes as I could think of 🤭 as always prioritizing high protein meals while keeping a balance with eating out - hope you got some inspo from these recipes!

RECIPES BELOW

WEDNESDAY
Breakfast: 2 eggs cramble w/ chives and feta + seedy bread, cream cheese, and tomatoes/peaches
Lunch: chicken thighs w/ raw carrot salad

Raw Carrot Salad
4-5 carrots
2 Gre
